title: Developer Setup
description: Prepare compiler tools, IDE structures, and linker configurations for building C++ projects.
learningObjectives: Configure standard development environments like Visual Studio
Resolve common linker errors and compile-time issues

sections.title: Build Chain Foundations
sections.content:
Compiling translates readable C++ text files into hardware machine instructions. The build pipeline consists of:

1. **Preprocessor**: Expands headers (#include) and macros (#define).
2. **Compiler**: Translates code to assembly/object files (.obj).
3. **Linker**: Combines object files and external libraries into a single executable (.exe).

sections.title: Unresolved External Symbol Errors
